privileged_info_summary: The task uses three real, publicly available academic papers with correct page numbers: Turing's 'On Computable Numbers' (1937, pages 230-265), Shannon's 'A Mathematical Theory of Communication' (1948, pages 379-423), and He et al.'s 'Deep Residual Learning for Image Recognition' (2016, pages 770-778). These papers are seeded into a Zotero citation library with correct page formatting, then deliberately corrupted with double hyphens and en-dashes to create the task scenario.
